## Hi there, I'm Ethan! 👋

Hey there, I’m Ethan. I'm passionate about solving large problems, and I currently work as an Embedded Software Engineer at [TP-Link Systems](https://www.tp-link.com/).

For nearly a decade, I’ve focused on improving the user experience of existing platforms and have made organizational processes orders of magnitude more efficient.

**Recently, I've been a part of...**

- [@icssc](https://github.com/icssc) as the Internal VP and as a Project Lead (2023-2026)
- [@gethopscotch](https://github.com/gethopscotch/) as the Lead Developer (2021-2026)
- [@treasure-hacks](https://github.com/treasure-hacks) as the Co-Founder and CTO (2021-2024)

**Over the past decade, I've created...**

- Hopscotch's _first complete web platform_ [(the journey)](https://awesome-e.dev/projects/hopscotch-web-editor.html)
- A team culture that led [PeterPortal](https://github.com/icssc/peterportal-client) to clear 4 years of tech debt, enact a visual overhaul, and achieve the stability required for a [merge with AntAlmanac](https://docs.icssc.club/docs/about/antalmanac/merge)
- A [_machine-learning app_](https://awesome-e.dev/projects/hopkeep.html) (with a web interface) to select high-quality coding projects **36x more efficiently**
- A [_hackathon judging app_](https://awesome-e.dev/projects/hackeval.html) to streamline my own event's judging process
- Comprehensive [_GitHub Curriculum_](https://awesome-e.dev/projects/github-curriculum.html) for hackathon participants unfamiliar with version control
- [Video tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/@gamechanger-project/playlists) to help **84,000 viewers** with no prior coding experience _make cool projects_!

[And more...](https://awesome-e.dev/projects/)

<br>
